segments.text: Now listen to me, Job. Pay attention to everything I have to say.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Look, I'm about to speak; my mouth is ready to talk.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: My words come from my upright heart; my lips speak sincerely of what I know.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The spirit of God made me, and the breath of the Almighty gives me life.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Answer me, if you can. St and in front of me and prepare to defend yourself.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Look, before God we are both the same. I was also made from a piece of clay.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: See here, you don't need to be frightened of me. I won't be too hard on you.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You spoke in my hearing and I have listened to everything you had to say.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You say, ‘I'm clean, I've done nothing wrong; I'm pure, I have not sinned.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: See how God finds fault with me and treats me as his enemy.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He puts my feet in the stocks and watches everything I do.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But look, you are wrong—let me explain. God is greater than any human being.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Why are you fighting against him, complaining that God isn't answering your questions?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: God speaks over and over again,  but people don't notice.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Through dreams and visions in the night, when people fall into deep sleep, resting on their beds,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: God speaks to them with solemn warnings
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: to turn them away from doing wrong and to stop them from becoming proud.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He saves them from the grave and spares them from violent death.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: People are also disciplined on a bed of pain with constant aching in their bones.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They have no desire to eat; they do not even want their favorite dishes.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Their flesh wastes away to nothing; all that's left is skin and bones.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They are close to death;  their lives approaching the executioner.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But if an angel appears, a mediator, one of God's thousands of angels, to tell someone the right way for them,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: he will be gracious to them. He will say, ‘Save them from going down into the grave, for I have found a way to free them.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Then their bodies will be renewed as if they were young again; they will be as strong as when they were in their prime.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They will pray to God, and he will accept them; they come into God's presence with joy, and he will set things right for them.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They sing, and tell others, ‘I sinned, I distorted what is right, but it did not do me any good.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He saved me from going down into the grave and I will live in the light.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Look, God does this time and again for people;
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: he saves them from the grave so they might see the light of life.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Pay attention Job, and listen to me! Be quiet—let me speak!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But if you have anything to say, then speak up.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: If not, listen to me. Keep quiet and I will teach you wisdom.
segments.speaker: Unknown
